title: Weak Authentication Bypass
description: Due to a lack of information regarding authentication mechanisms, an attacker could potentially bypass authentication controls, gaining unauthorized access to the system. This could involve exploiting vulnerabilities in the authentication process, such as weak passwords, lack of multi-factor authentication, or vulnerabilities in the authentication libraries themselves.
attack_vector: Exploitation of vulnerabilities in the authentication logic, credential stuffing, brute-force attacks, or social engineering to obtain valid credentials.
mitigations: Implement Multi-Factor Authentication (MFA) for all users.
Enforce strong password policies (length, complexity, rotation).
Regularly audit authentication logs for suspicious activity.
